ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), OR( ISPICKVAL(Account.Activity_Type__c, "Unknown"), ISPICKVAL(Account.Activity_Type__c, "Banned"), ISPICKVAL(Account.Activity_Type__c, "Cancelled") ), $Profile.Name != "System Administrator", $Profile.Name != "ERP Integration Service" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: ❌ You cannot create an Opportunity for accounts with activity type Unknown, Banned, or Cancelled
